home.servicesDescription: We offer a full spectrum of design services — from concept to completion, tailored to every space and purpose.

home.serviceArchDesc: Designing structures that balance form, function, and context.

home.serviceCraftDesc: Artisanal details and bespoke craftsmanship for unique projects.
home.processTitle:
A clear process,
from vision to reality
home.processDescription: Every project follows a structured approach — ensuring quality, transparency, and alignment at every stage.
home.step1Desc: Understanding your needs, budget, and vision through in-depth conversation.
home.step2Desc: Developing mood boards, layouts, and initial concepts for your approval.
home.step3Desc: Detailed drawings, material selection, and 3D visualization.
home.step4Desc: Construction supervision, quality control, and handover.
home.aboutTitle: We believe great design starts with listening — to the space, the people, and the purpose.
home.aboutDescription: Two Desk Studio is a multidisciplinary design practice based in Bangkok. We specialize in interior, architecture, furniture, and craft design — approaching each project with curiosity and precision.
home.ctaDescription: Tell us about your project. We'd love to hear your ideas and explore how we can bring them to life.

hero.label: About Us
hero.heading: We believe great design starts with listening
hero.description: Two Desk Studio is a multidisciplinary design practice based in Bangkok. We specialize in interior, architecture, furniture, and craft design — approaching each project with curiosity, precision, and a deep respect for the spaces we shape.

philosophy.heading: Design with purpose, build with care
philosophy.paragraph1: At Two Desk, we approach every project as a conversation — between the space, the people who use it, and the vision behind it. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Instead, we listen, research, and craft designs that are as unique as the stories they hold.
philosophy.paragraph2: Our studio brings together architecture, interior design, furniture, and craft under one roof. This multidisciplinary approach allows us to think holistically — from the structure of a building to the texture of a door handle — ensuring every detail serves a purpose.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.description: Crafting functional, beautiful interiors for commercial and residential spaces — from concept to completion.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Designing structures that balance form, function, and context — buildings that belong to their surroundings.

furniture.title: Furniture Design
furniture.description: Custom-made furniture that complements every design vision — functional art for everyday living.

craft.title: Craft Design
craft.description: Artisanal details and bespoke craftsmanship for unique projects — where precision meets creativity.
